values.description: API base URL. Override with --env-var in CI.
Keycloak base URL (no trailing slash). Override with --env-var in CI.
Primary test user (Admin+User roles). Injected by CI secret E2E_USERNAME or api-e2e-local.sh.
Primary test user password. Injected by CI secret E2E_PASSWORD or api-e2e-local.sh.
Second test user (User role only) — used for 403 ownership guard tests. Injected by CI secret E2E_USERNAME2.
Second test user password. Injected by CI secret E2E_PASSWORD2.
JWT access token for user 1. Auto-minted by the collection Pre-request Script.
JWT access token for user 2 (second user). Minted in the Authorization Guards Pre-request Script.
Internal — epoch ms when bearerToken expires (with 30s buffer). Managed by Pre-request Script.
YYYY-MM for the current test run. Set dynamically by the Budgets+Transactions Pre-request Script.
Captured at runtime by the Budgets + Transactions spending flow.
Captured at runtime by the Budgets + Transactions spending flow.
Captured at runtime by the Trades lifecycle folder.
Captured at runtime by the Watched Symbols lifecycle folder.
Captured at runtime by the Validation folder seed request.
Captured at runtime by the Authorization Guards seed request.
Captured at runtime by the Authorization Guards seed request.
CoinGecko Demo or Pro API key. Optional — leave blank for unauthenticated (rate-limited) access. Injected by CI secret COINGECKO_API_KEY.
ExchangeRate-API v6 key. Required to run the ExchangeRate schema check — request is skipped when blank. Injected by CI secret EXCHANGE_RATE_API_KEY.
